theme: Engine bug fixes and leak fix
highlights_headline: SkiaSharp 4.151.0 merges upstream Skia m151 bug fixes and patches a native resource leak.
highlights_body: The bundled Skia engine receives another round of upstream chrome/m151 bug fixes, and a native handle leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData is now corrected.

bullets.lead: Upstream Skia m151 bug fixes merged
bullets.detail: A second sync from the chrome/m151 upstream branch brings additional rendering bug fixes and stability improvements across all platforms.

bullets.lead: Native resource leak in SKImage.FromEncodedData fixed
bullets.detail: SKImage.FromEncodedData(SKData, SKRectI) was not releasing the underlying native image handle when the subset decode produced a new object, causing a handle leak. This is now corrected.
